overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through an industrial district in Night City. The player moves from a covered area under an overpass into sunlit open streets with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a dystopian urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered industrial walkway beneath a concrete overpass

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating a covered walkway below
multi-story industrial building with blue corrugated metal siding
temporary construction fence made of corrugated metal sheets
tall wooden utility pole with multiple power lines
green painted metal safety railing along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a shadowed industrial corridor beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment features construction materials, metal fencing, and industrial buildings, with the distant city skyline barely visible ahead.

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass into bright direct sunlight
transitions from covered walkway to open urban plaza

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the overpass into a sunlit plaza area with distant skyscrapers visible

entered.detail: futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers forming the city skyline
long brown industrial wall with colorful 666th Street graffiti mural
tall palm tree with brown trunk and green fronds
modern street light with orange glowing fixture
tall metal lattice tower with multiple crossbars

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadows, the scene opens into a bright sunlit plaza. The camera reveals a stunning view of futuristic skyscrapers in the distance while approaching a long brown industrial wall featuring the colorful 666th Street mural.

events.description: large armored security vehicle passes from left to right across the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past pedestrians and street vendors near the 666th Street wall

notable_agents.action: armored security truck driving across the plaza from left to right

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the bustling plaza alongside the 666th Street wall, passing various pedestrians. An armored security vehicle drives across the open area as the camera moves past palm trees toward the street crossing.

events.description: begins crossing the street toward the large industrial building
red van drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while approaching a large industrial building with a digital billboard

notable_agents.action: person with green hair standing on the sidewalk talking on a phone

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with massive digital billboard on the facade
large blue cylindrical storage tanks with pipes
tall palm tree on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the street intersection, approaching a massive industrial building featuring a large digital billboard. Traffic including a red van passes through the intersection as pedestrians navigate the crosswalks in this busy urban corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed industrial underpass into a bright, bustling urban intersection of a futuristic city. It begins in a dim corridor beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past metal fencing and construction materials toward a distant skyline. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza where the view expands to reveal towering skyscrapers and a colorful mural on a long brown industrial wall. The movement continues alongside this wall through a crowd of pedestrians and past palm trees, momentarily crossing paths with an armored security vehicle. Finally, the camera navigates a busy street intersection, passing a red van and pedestrians before approaching a massive industrial building dominated by a large digital billboard.
